arguments.command:
for pkg in "System.Text.Json" "Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" "Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" "Azure.Storage.Blobs" "Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson" "OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" "xunit"; do
  ver=$(curl -s "https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/${pkg,,}/index.json" | python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=[v for v in json.load(sys.stdin)['versions'] if '-' not in v]; print(vs[-1])" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$pkg => $ver"
done

v8 = [v for v in vs if v.startswith('8.0.')]
print(f'net6.0 => {v6[-1]}')
print(f'net8.0 => {v8[-1]}')
